name: ashraful19/laravel-mailbridge
description: Provider-neutral transactional and marketing email bridge for Laravel.

suggest.sendgrid/sendgrid: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install sendgrid` for SendGrid support.
suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install ses` for Amazon SES support.
suggest.getbrevo/brevo-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install brevo` for Brevo support.
suggest.mailersend/laravel-driver: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install mailersend` for MailerSend support.
suggest.resend/resend-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install resend` for Resend support.
suggest.wildbit/postmark-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install postmark` for Postmark support.
suggest.mailchimp/marketing: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install mailchimp` for Mailchimp Marketing support.
suggest.mailchimp/transactional: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install mailchimp` for Mailchimp Transactional support.
suggest.mailerlite/mailerlite-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install mailerlite` for MailerLite support.
suggest.convertkit/convertkitapi: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install kit` for Kit support.
suggest.mailgun/mailgun-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install mailgun` for Mailgun support.
suggest.mailjet/mailjet-apiv3-php: Install with `php artisan mailbridge:install mailjet` for Mailjet support.
suggest.autosend/autosend-php: AutoSend provider uses the native REST API — no external SDK required.
